featureDescription:
AI Scope Brief Generator

Extend an existing Stratus work-order screen with an AI-assisted scope summarizer that reads recent job notes, fabrication constraints, and linked drawings metadata, then proposes a structured task brief for the field team. This tests brownfield navigation, C# API work, Vue UI changes, and agentic guardrails because the candidate must wire retrieval, structured output, and a human approval step into an existing workflow.
